message:
Strip unused zimdjson code: DOM wrappers, parseFromReader, ReaderError

Remove code VectorJSON never calls — it navigates the tape directly:
- Document/Value/Array/Object convenience methods (~450 lines)
- parseFromReader + ensureTotalCapacityForReader + reader_error field
- ReaderError type, readAllRetainingCapacity helper, is_not_scalar table

Zig's lazy compilation already stripped these from the binary (only 78
bytes difference), but removing the source makes the dependency cleaner.
